MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
Plaintiff STEAMBOAT PARTNERS, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted And Request For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 is off calendar for second failure to submit a courtesy copy of the moving papers to the Court pursuant to San Francisco Superior Court Local Rules of Court, Rule 2.6B. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca L. Woodson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of And Mtn To Deem Facts As Admitted And Req. For Attorney Fees Of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee Of $60.00 And Ntc Of Submission

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
Plaintiff STEAMBOAT PARTNERS, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S Motion to Deem Facts as Admitted and Request for Attorney Fees of $200.00 Plus Filing Fee of $60.00 and Notice of Submission is continued to October 3, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 19, 2013, at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
